{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/25558174?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/wodzen", "id": 25558174, "login": "wodzen", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI1NTU4MTc0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/wodzen", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45049", "cvss": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-201", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Sent Data"}], "description": "## Summary

**Description**

An Information Exposure Through Sent Data (CWE-201) issue in OpenAM's Cross-Domain Single Sign-On (CDSSO) servlet allows a logged-in user's raw OpenAM session token to be POSTed to an attacker-controlled URL. This impacts OpenAM Community Edition through version 16.0.6. This issue was patched in version 16.1.1.

An attacker who can induce a logged-in victim to visit a crafted URL may receive the victim's session credential, which could enable session hijacking.

## Impact
OpenAM deployments through version 16.0.6 that have CDSSO enabled are potentially affected. The CDSSO component is commonly enabled in multi-domain deployments. Exploitation requires user interaction — an authenticated user must be induced to visit an attacker-crafted URL — and is further gated on a non-default configuration being absent.

## Patch
This has been patched in OpenAM Community Edition version 16.1.1. Users are encouraged to update to the latest release.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r9pv-5rpp-vm8g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T17:33:14Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r9pv-5rpp-vm8g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r9pv-5rpp-vm8g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45049"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T17:33:14Z", "references": ["https://github.com/OpenIdentityPlatform/OpenAM/security/advisories/GHSA-r9pv-5rpp-vm8g", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r9pv-5rpp-vm8g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/OpenIdentityPlatform/OpenAM/security-advisories/GHSA-r9pv-5rpp-vm8g", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/OpenIdentityPlatform/OpenAM", "summary": "OpenAM Unauthenticated Session Hijacking via Information Exposure in CDCServlet", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T17:33:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r9pv-5rpp-vm8g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "16.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.openidentityplatform.openam:openam-federation"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 16.0.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenAM Unauthenticated Session Hijacking via Information Exposure in CDCServlet
